data.after_or_equal: The value must be equal or after :after_or_equal.
data.alpha: The field must contain only alphabetic characters.
data.alpha_dash: The field must contain only alpha-numeric characters, dashes or underscores.
data.alpha_num: The field must only contain alpha-numeric characters.
data.before_or_equal: The value must be equal or before :before_or_equal.
data.between: The value must be between :min and :max.
data.confirmed: The field confirmation does not match.
data.date: The field requires a valid date format.
data.different: The fields must have different values.
data.digits_between: The digit value must be between :min and :max.
data.email: The field requires a valid format.
data.hex: The value must contain only hexadecimal characters.
data.in: The selected field requires a valid format.
data.integer: The value must be an integer.

max.numeric: The value may not be greater than :max.
max.string: The character count may not be greater than :max.

min.numeric: The value must be at least :min.
min.string: The character count must be at least :min

data.numeric: The value must be a number.
data.present: The field must be present (but can be empty).
data.required_if: The field is required when :other is :value.
data.required_unless: The field is required when :other is not :value.
data.required_with: The field is required when :field is not empty.
data.required_with_all: The field is required since other fields are not empty.
data.required_without: The field is required when :field is empty.
data.required_without_all: This field is required since other fields are empty.
data.string: The value must be a string.
